title: draba turgida
intro: Draba turgida, also known as the upright whitlow-grass, is a species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly as an anti-inflammatory and antiseptic agent, which can help to soothe and heal wounds, as well as reduce swelling and pain. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and supporting respiratory health. In herbal preparations, Draba turgida is often used in teas, infusions, and ointments, where it is valued for its ability to promote healing, reduce inflammation, and protect against infections.
